title: Alternative to soul juice theory
wikitext:
[]: Alternative to 'soul juice' theory             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon Jun 14, 2010 2:17 am There's something I noticed in the script of ep19: IBUKI: Unit 01 has reached its activation limit. The backup isn't working either!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 14, 2010 7:58 am Alternatively alternatively, they're (lamely) explaining the backup out of the picture so that we once again have the set-up "Eva moves without any apparent power source". Also note: Episode 20 wrote: Misato: Restrained by the cage... are you sure it's safe? HYUGA: No internal thermal, electron, electromagnetic, or chemical energy readings are being detected. The S2 engine is completely inactive. Misato: Nevertheless, under those conditions, Unit 01 has moved on three separate occasions . You can't treat it carelessly based only on what we can see and measure.

[]:             Quote Post by sephirotic » Mon Jun 14, 2010 8:38 am evas are organics beings, thus, they only need to breathe to gain enough energy to move, that's why in ep 19's berserk, for the first time Shinji hears the Heartbeat of the eva, the circulatory system started working. Note, that the eva opens it's mouth, allowing it to inalate Air. Simple as that.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 14, 2010 11:27 am sephirotic wrote: Simple as that.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark doom » Mon Jun 14, 2010 1:15 pm Tiss Dirac sea, tiss nothing there at all, not even air. Tiss just aloud of negative atom's.

[]:             Quote Post by sephirotic » Mon Jun 14, 2010 1:19 pm Reichu wrote: Molecular oxygen seems beside the point. Eva-01 also reactivates inside a Dirac Sea, which probably has no atmospheric qualities to speak of.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 14, 2010 1:42 pm The Evas using metabolism to power themselves for brief periods of time has been suggested in the past, and it's probably the alternative to "soul juice" (i.e. something mysterious and metabiological in nature) that I favor the most. But the quote from #20 does make me wonder. I just checked the Japanese, and it seems essentially accurate. HYUGA: No internal thermal, electron, electromagnetic, or chemical energy readings are being detected. The S2 engine is completely inactive. Misato: Nevertheless, under those conditions, Unit 01 has moved on three separate occasions.

[]:             Quote Post by sephirotic » Mon Jun 14, 2010 5:20 pm Reichu wrote: The Evas using metabolism to power themselves for brief periods of time has been suggested in the past, and it's probably the alternative to "soul juice" (i.e. something mysterious and metabiological in nature) that I favor the most. But the quote from #20 does make me wonder. I just checked the Japanese, and it seems essentially accurate. "Under those conditions, Unit 01..." is actually "kono Shogouki". "Kono" seems to be implying "the Eva-01 before us" = "the Eva-01 under discussion", if that makes any sense. (Translation is annoying.) Clearly, Misato can't be referring to the S2 Engine as an element in the "moving without power" incidents. But since she does say "However", she's implying that what Hyuga said is relevant to what she's about to say. When Eva-01 moved inside the Cage (#01), escaped from Leliel (#16), and reactivated to fight Zeruel (#19), had she been in a state where "no internal thermal, electron, electromagnetic, or chemical energy readings" were detected?

[]:             Quote Post by The Fourth Evangelion » Wed Jun 16, 2010 10:26 am sephirotic wrote: evas are organics beings, thus, they only need to breathe to gain enough energy to move, that's why in ep 19's berserk, for the first time Shinji hears the Heartbeat of the eva, the circulatory system started working. Note, that the eva opens it's mouth, allowing it to inalate Air. Simple as that.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jun 16, 2010 11:54 am The Fourth Evangelion wrote: That's not the heartbeat, it was confirmed that it sounded like one, due to Zer punching 01's core.
